message:
feat(checkpoint,cli,pipeline,events,server): harden validation, fix truncation, enrich API responses

Adds checkpoint metadata validation on load and import (ID/session mismatch
detection, safe directory resolution, metadata re-serialization after override).
Refactors CLI session resolution in add/extract/scale/rebalance/rollback to use
ValidateSessionName consistently. Extracts resolveErrorAction helper in pipeline
executor and adds parallel/parser/executor test coverage. Fixes events truncation
flag (OR instead of overwrite) and enriches attention events API payload with
success/timestamp/version/output_format/error fields. Expands server and
attention_feed test suites (+141/+167 lines).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -195,7 +195,7 @@ func runSummary(args []string, sinceStr, format string, recent, regenerate bool)
 		Session:        session,
 		Outputs:        outputs,
 		Format:         sumFormat,
-		ProjectKey:     wd,
+		ProjectKey:     projectDir,
 		ProjectDir:     projectDir,
 		IncludeGitDiff: true,
 	}

@@ -47,7 +47,7 @@ const (
 // WorkflowSettings contains global workflow configuration
 type WorkflowSettings struct {
 	Timeout          Duration    `yaml:"timeout,omitempty" toml:"timeout,omitempty" json:"timeout,omitempty"`    // Global timeout (e.g., "30m")
-	OnError          ErrorAction `yaml:"on_error,omitempty" toml:"on_error,omitempty" json:"on_error,omitempty"` // fail, continue
+	OnError          ErrorAction `yaml:"on_error,omitempty" toml:"on_error,omitempty" json:"on_error,omitempty"` // fail, fail_fast, continue, retry
 	NotifyOnComplete bool        `yaml:"notify_on_complete,omitempty" toml:"notify_on_complete,omitempty" json:"notify_on_complete,omitempty"`
 	NotifyOnError    bool        `yaml:"notify_on_error,omitempty" toml:"notify_on_error,omitempty" json:"notify_on_error,omitempty"`
 	NotifyChannels   []string    `yaml:"notify_channels,omitempty" toml:"notify_channels,omitempty" json:"notify_channels,omitempty"` // desktop, webhook, mail
